name: memory-curator
description: Curate, route, and validate file-based agent memory with explicit safety gates.

interface.shortDescription: Keep file-based agent memory accurate and lean
interface.longDescription: Route, inspect, curate, and validate file-based agent memory with explicit approval for destructive changes.
defaultPrompt: Check this project's memory health and route the relevant notes.
Audit this memory library and propose safe cleanup actions.
Curate stale or conflicting memory after showing me the change list.
